TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Siwa_finacadan_serangawan_a_niyalo, title = Siwa_finacadan_serangawan_a_niyalo, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Siwa_finacadan_serangawan_a_niyalo} }

S.FORM: 75-7-27 a romiad misatapangay a paluwad tonya siwa finacadan a paniyaro'an, itini i fangcalay a pasadak tono yincumin akahilahila a serangawan, itini i makapahay a lotok ato pahanaan, saka adihay ko maolahay a lafan a tayni misalama, itini i taywan o sata angayay no paputal a po u kwan, saka adihay ko tiniay a minengneng tono yincumin a demak, naw hani o icuwacuwaay a kayko tayni a liwku, paka alaw cangra to tokopic no taywan a wenfa. Tonya siwa finacadan haw i, iraay ko tolo taangayay a kasapinangan Saka cecay siwa ko finacadan, o tayal, o amis, o paiwan, o bunun, O saysiyat, o piyuma, o rukay, o tsou, o yami, kahilahila ko demak ato pinangan, o pafana to tayniay a lafan, ato pafana to ka i kolay teluc, toya lihoc sataangayay o no yincumin a sacecay cecay a luma pikaysak, ira ko kakeruan ato kikian kadufa musiruy a nengnengen. mapatasekal mafana ko cimacima a tayniay a widang, o yincumin no taywan tadafancalay. Saka tusa o pisalamaan fasiw fafiw sanay, o kaolahan no wawa a misalama, ano awa ko icel no falocu akato pikalic, ira ko yufu sawi i cilang taykonsan mayatansyin haytawcan cinkwasan kahilahila atasalamaan, mahemek ko wawa a tayra. saka tolo o pahanaan kahilahila no hana tadamakapahay, iraay ko kisya to pikalican, taliyok han no kisya a cumikay, salipahak sako falucu a minengneng to makapahay a hana. 85-7-27 aromi ad ira ko pikiting a kayki, saka no yincumi a romiad, toya lalomaay a kahilahila dafung adihaya ko pipadang no yincumin saan, mikansya patikul to pipadama saan, toya romiad o pinokayan no yincumin, malacecay mahemek lipahak a misalama.
S.PHON: **-*-** a ro~umia…¨~…ģ misatapaŇčaj a pa…ĺo~u~uwa…¨~…ģ to~unja siwa fina ¶a…¨~…ģan a panijaro~u °an, itini i faŇč ¶a…ĺaj a pasa…¨~…ģak to~uno~u jin ¶o~u~umin akańßi…ĺańßi…ĺa a s…ôraŇčawan, itini i makapańßaj a …ĺo~uto~uk ato~u pańßanaan, saka a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u mao~u…ĺańßaj a …ĺafan a tajni misa…ĺama, itini i tajwan o~u sata aŇčajaj no~u papo~u~uta…ĺ a po~u o~u~u kwan, saka a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u tiniaj a min…ôŇčn…ôŇč to~uno~u jin ¶o~u~umin a …¨~…ģ…ômak, naw ńßani o~u i ¶o~u~uwa ¶o~u~uwaaj a kajko~u tajni a …ĺiwko~u~u, paka a…ĺaw ¶aŇčra to~u to~uko~upi ¶ no~u tajwan a w…ônfa. to~unja siwa fina ¶a…¨~…ģan ńßaw i, iraaj ko~u to~u…ĺo~u taaŇčajaj a kasapinaŇčan saka ¶…ô ¶aj siwa ko~u fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, o~u taja…ĺ, o~u amis, o~u paiwan, o~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un, o~u sajsijat, o~u pijo~u~uma, o~u ro~u~ukaj, o~u tso~uo~u~u, o~u jami, kańßi…ĺańßi…ĺa ko~u …¨~…ģ…ômak ato~u pinaŇčan, o~u pafana to~u tajniaj a …ĺafan, ato~u pafana to~u ka i ko~u…ĺaj t…ô…ĺo~u~u ¶, to~uja …ĺińßo~u ¶ sataaŇčajaj o~u no~u jin ¶o~u~umin a sa ¶…ô ¶aj ¶…ô ¶aj a …ĺo~u~uma pikajsak, ira ko~u kak…ôro~u~uan ato~u kikian ka…¨~…ģo~u~ufa mo~u~usiro~u~uj a n…ôŇčn…ôŇč…ôn. mapatas…ôka…ĺ mafana ko~u ¶ima ¶ima a tajniaj a wi…¨~…ģaŇč, o~u jin ¶o~u~umin no~u tajwan ta…¨~…ģafan ¶a…ĺaj. saka to~u~usa o~u pisa…ĺamaan fasiw fafiw sanaj, o~u kao~u…ĺańßan no~u wawa a misa…ĺama, ano~u awa ko~u i ¶…ô…ĺ no~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u~u akato~u pika…ĺi ¶, ira ko~u jo~u~ufo~u~u sawi i ¶i…ĺaŇč tajko~unsan majatansjin ńßajtaw ¶an ¶inkwasan kańßi…ĺańßi…ĺa atasa…ĺamaan, mańß…ôm…ôk ko~u wawa a tajra. saka to~u…ĺo~u o~u pańßanaan kańßi…ĺańßi…ĺa no~u ńßana ta…¨~…ģamakapańßaj, iraaj ko~u kisja to~u pika…ĺi ¶an, ta…ĺijo~uk ńßan no~u kisja a ¶o~u~umikaj, sa…ĺipańßak sako~u fa…ĺo~u~u ¶o~u~u a min…ôŇčn…ôŇč to~u makapańßaj a ńßana. **-*-** aro~umi a…¨~…ģ ira ko~u pikitiŇč a kajki, saka no~u jin ¶o~u~umi a ro~umia…¨~…ģ, to~uja …ĺa…ĺo~umaaj a kańßi…ĺańßi…ĺa …¨~…ģafo~u~uŇč a…¨~…ģińßaja ko~u pipa…¨~…ģaŇč no~u jin ¶o~u~umin saan, mikansja patiko~u~u…ĺ to~u pipa…¨~…ģama saan, to~uja ro~umia…¨~…ģ o~u pino~ukajan no~u jin ¶o~u~umin, ma…ĺa ¶…ô ¶aj mańß…ôm…ôk …ĺipańßak a misa…ĺama.
S.FORM: 75-7-27 a romiad misatapangay a paluwad tonya siwa finacadan a paniyaro'an, itini i fangcalay a pasadak tono yincumin akahilahila a serangawan, itini i makapahay a lotok ato pahanaan, saka adihay ko maolahay a lafan a tayni misalama, itini i taywan o sata angayay no paputal a po u kwan, saka adihay ko tiniay a minengneng tono yincumin a demak, naw hani o icuwacuwaay a kayko tayni a liwku, paka alaw cangra to tokopic no taywan a wenfa. Tonya siwa finacadan haw i, iraay ko tolo taangayay a kasapinangan Saka cecay siwa ko finacadan, o tayal, o amis, o paiwan, o bunun, O saysiyat, o piyuma, o rukay, o tsou, o yami, kahilahila ko demak ato pinangan, o pafana to tayniay a lafan, ato pafana to ka i kolay teluc, toya lihoc sataangayay o no yincumin a sacecay cecay a luma pikaysak, ira ko kakeruan ato kikian kadufa musiruy a nengnengen. mapatasekal mafana ko cimacima a tayniay a widang, o yincumin no taywan tadafancalay. Saka tusa o pisalamaan fasiw fafiw sanay, o kaolahan no wawa a misalama, ano awa ko icel no falocu akato pikalic, ira ko yufu sawi i cilang taykonsan mayatansyin haytawcan cinkwasan kahilahila atasalamaan, mahemek ko wawa a tayra. saka tolo o pahanaan kahilahila no hana tadamakapahay, iraay ko kisya to pikalican, taliyok han no kisya a cumikay, salipahak sako falucu a minengneng to makapahay a hana. 85-7-27 aromi ad ira ko pikiting a kayki, saka no yincumi a romiad, toya lalomaay a kahilahila dafung adihaya ko pipadang no yincumin saan, mikansya patikul to pipadama saan, toya romiad o pinokayan no yincumin, malacecay mahemek lipahak a misalama.

fina ¶a…¨~…ģan ńßaw i, iraaj ko~u to~u…ĺo~u taaŇčajaj a kasapinaŇčan saka ¶…ô ¶aj siwa ko~u fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, o~u taja…ĺ, o~u amis, o~u paiwan, o~u b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un, o~u sajsijat, o~u pijo~u~uma, o~u no~u jin ¶o~u~umin a sa ¶…ô ¶aj ¶…ô ¶aj a …ĺo~u~uma pikajsak, ira ko~u kak…ôro~u~uan ato~u kikian ka…¨~…ģo~u~ufa mo~u~usiro~u~uj a n…ôŇčn…ôŇč…ôn. mapatas…ôka…ĺ mafana ko~u ¶ima ¶ima a tajniaj a wi…¨~…ģaŇč, o~u jin ¶o~u~umin no~u tajwan ta…¨~…ģafan ¶a…ĺaj. saka to~u~usa o~u pisa…ĺamaan fasiw fafiw sanaj, o~u kao~u…ĺańßan no~u wawa a misa…ĺama, ano~u awa ko~u i ¶…ô…ĺ no~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u~u akato~u pika…ĺi ¶, ira ko~u jo~u~ufo~u~u sawi i ¶i…ĺaŇč tajko~unsan majatansjin ńßajtaw ¶an ¶inkwasan kańßi…ĺańßi…ĺa atasa…ĺamaan, mańß…ôm…ôk ko~u wawa a tajra. saka to~u…ĺo~u o~u pańßanaan kańßi…ĺańßi…ĺa no~u ńßana ta…¨~…ģamakapańßaj, iraaj ko~u kisja to~u pika…ĺi ¶an, ta…ĺijo~uk ńßan no~u kisja a ¶o~u~umikaj, sa…ĺipańßak sako~u fa…ĺo~u~u ¶o~u~u a min…ôŇčn…ôŇč to~u makapańßaj a ńßana. **-*-** aro~umi a…¨~…ģ ira ko~u pikitiŇč a kajki, saka no~u jin ¶o~u~umi a ro~umia…¨~…ģ, to~uja …ĺa…ĺo~umaaj a kańßi…ĺańßi…ĺa …¨~…ģafo~u~uŇč a…¨~…ģińßaja ko~u pipa…¨~…ģaŇč no~u jin ¶o~u~umin saan, mikansja patiko~u~u…ĺ to~u pipa…¨~…ģama saan, to~uja ro~umia…¨~…ģ o~u pino~ukajan no~u jin ¶o~u~umin, ma…ĺa ¶…ô ¶aj mańß…ôm…ôk …ĺipańßak a misa…ĺama.
